name: Peanut Butter Nanaimo Bars
recipeInstructions:
Base:
Melt semisweet chocolate and butter in microwave on high power for 2 minutes.
Mix in sugar, vanilla, and egg. Stir in graham cracker crumbs, shredded coconut, and chopped nuts.
Press mixture into a greased 9-inch square pan.
Chill.
Filling:
Custard powder, 2 tablespoons (Bird's is the most common brand)
Milk, ¼ cup
Smooth peanut butter, 2 cups
Granulated sugar or confectioner’s sifted sugar, 1 cup
Icing:
Semisweet chocolate, 5 ounces chopped
Butter, 1 tablespoon
Combine custard powder and milk in a bowl. Stir in softened butter and smooth peanut butter until well combined.
Mix in granulated or confectioner’s sifted sugar until smooth.
Spread over the chilled base.
Melt semisweet chocolate and butter together on medium power for 3 to 4 minutes.
Pour melted mixture over the filling and spread evenly.
Chill again before cutting into bars.
